name: @tradeproof/mcp-server
description: Look up contractor licenses and workers' compensation insurance across all 50 US states. 5M+ records sourced from official state licensing board databases.

tools.name: lookup_license
tools.description: Look up a specific contractor license by state and license number

tools.name: search_contractors
tools.description: Search for contractors by business name, optionally filtered by state, city, classification, or status

tools.name: check_batch
tools.description: Check the status of multiple contractor licenses at once (up to 100)

tools.name: check_insurance
tools.description: Check workers' compensation insurance coverage for an employer in a specific state

tools.name: get_coverage_info
tools.description: Get information about TradeProof's data coverage across US states (free, no quota cost)
